description: A flour tortilla wrapped around breakfast fillings, most commonly scrambled eggs plus ingredients such as cheese, potatoes, beans, bacon, sausage, chorizo, salsa, or avocado.
preparation_steps: Cook the fillings, usually eggs plus any potatoes, meat, or vegetables.
Warm the tortilla so it rolls without tearing.
Add fillings in a centered line.
Fold the sides and roll tightly into a burrito.
Serve immediately or toast the seam side for structure.

health_advice.benefits: Can be a filling, protein-rich meal and can include vegetables and beans for better balance.
health_advice.risks: Large versions can become very high in calories, sodium, and saturated fat, especially with processed meats and extra cheese.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Use a reasonable tortilla size, add vegetables or beans, and avoid overloading it with meat and cheese.

dietary_notes.note: Commonly adaptable. Vegan versions often use tofu scramble, and gluten-free versions need a gluten-free tortilla.

allergens: Dairy if cheese or sour cream is used
